summary: Iteration 56: Verified 3 backend fixes - (1) Vehicle-schedule now returns 13 reservations for March 2026 (was only 2) using $or clause for datetime+string handling, (2) Admin reservations sorted by start_date DESC, (3) Client reservations sorted by start_date DESC. All 11 pytest tests passed. Frontend vehicles page layout verified with 3-column grid.

issues: Current layout shows 'Filtres' button first instead of 'Tous' category pill as mentioned in vehicles.tsx code - minor discrepancy between code and rendered output that may need verification

details.fix_applied: $or clause handles both datetime and string date formats

details.code_review: vehicles.tsx uses useWindowDimensions with numCols = 3 at 1200px+, 2 at 768px+, 1 below
details.visual_verification: Screenshot shows 3-column grid at 1920px desktop width

critical_code_review_comments: agencies.py: Correct use of $or clause to handle both datetime and string dates in vehicle-schedule query - this fixes the VPS data inconsistency issue
agencies.py: End of day boundary (23:59:59) properly set to include reservations on the last day
admin.py: Reservations now sorted by start_date -1 (DESC) instead of created_at -1
reservations.py: Client reservations also sorted by start_date -1 for consistency
vehicles.tsx: Clean responsive 3-column grid implementation using useWindowDimensions

success_rate.frontend: 100% - 3-column grid layout verified at desktop width

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fixes verified: (1) vehicle-schedule uses $or for datetime+string dates and returns 13 March reservations, (2) admin/reservations sorted by start_date DESC, (3) client/reservations sorted by start_date DESC. Frontend vehicles page shows 3-column grid at desktop (1920px). Login credentials: admin-geneva@logirent.ch / LogiRent2024! for admin, jean.dupont@gmail.com / LogiRent2024! for client.
